snippet: Will was gawky. He was close in age with Ser [LINK] .(wiki:Will_(squire).cite_ref-Rtmk.7B.7B.7B2.7D.7D.7D.7B.7B.7B3.7D.7D.7D.7B...

...wiki:Duncan_the_Tall) threatened him and took back the armor he had lost to [LINK] in the [Whitewalls Tourney](wiki:Whitewalls_Tourney).(wiki:Will_(squire).ci...
...m. Here, tell me what you see. **Will**: This one's good, m'lord. There's a [LINK] on the one side and a [king](wiki:King) on t'other...(wiki:Will_(squire).ci...
